title: Tokyo After Rain
description: Reflections, neon, and compressed night streets after the storm passes.

photos.title: Crossing Blue
photos.alt: A stylized travel placeholder showing a rainy Tokyo crossing with blue reflections.
photos.caption: The wet street becomes another light source once the crowd starts moving.

photos.title: Alley Steam
photos.alt: A stylized travel placeholder of a narrow Tokyo alley after rain.
photos.caption: The best frames were just off the main road, where the city felt closer to whispering.
